title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Saved themes list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
Pinia holds custom themes, active theme, editor tokens, and preview tab — shared across components
Implemented with Vue 3, Pinia, and Tailwind CSS; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist themes or editor state
Manages the themes collection only in component-local refs rather than Pinia
Three-panel themes/editor/preview workspace remains dense and tool-like, not a marketing card stack
Empty My themes state is visually present when no custom themes remain
Collapses into a single-column equal-card marketing layout with no distinct themes/editor/preview panels
Required hover animations are present on theme rows, chrome, and buttons; hold-to-add and preview re-theme animate as specified
Preview tab and mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover washes on theme rows or controls so the studio feels static on pointer hover
